allow: Bash(py scripts/search.py "security threat analysis mobile app trust fintech" --design-system -p "ShieldAI")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import fastapi, sqlalchemy, structlog, aiosqlite, httpx, jose, passlib; print\('core deps OK'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import groq; print\('groq', groq.__version__\); from app.services.ai.providers.groq import GroqAIProvider; from app.services.ai import get_ai_provider; p=get_ai_provider\(\); print\('provider OK:', type\(p\).__name__\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.core.config import get_settings; s=get_settings\(\); print\('key cargada:', s.groq_api_key[:8]+'...'+s.groq_api_key[-4:] if s.groq_api_key else 'VACIA'\); print\('chat:', s.groq_chat_model\); print\('vision:', s.groq_vision_model\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.services.ai.scam_index import get_scam_index; m=get_scam_index\(\).search\('hola un tipo me dice que me dara 500bs si le paso 100'\); print\([\(x.entry.title, round\(x.score,1\)\) for x in m]\)")

PowerShell($procs = Get-Process -Name engram -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($procs\) { $procs | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String | Write-Output; $procs | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Write-Output "Procesos engram detenidos: $\($procs.Count\)" } else { Write-Output "No hay procesos engram en ejecucion" })
